manifest.name: Sindri Dark
manifest.description: Sindri's default dark colour theme — deep navy with a blue accent.

readmeContent: Sindri's default dark colour theme. Deep navy background with a blue accent.

manifest.name: Sindri Light
manifest.description: Sindri's built-in light colour theme — clean whites with a blue accent.

readmeContent: Sindri's built-in light colour theme. Clean white background with a blue accent.

manifest.name: Sindri Void
manifest.description: Near-black background, blue accent. Maximum contrast dark theme.

readmeContent: Near-black background with a blue accent. Maximum contrast dark theme for focused work.

manifest.name: Sindri File Icons
manifest.description: Sindri's built-in file icon set — 108 file and folder icons using Phosphor shapes and simple-icons brand logos.

credits.name: Simple Icons
credits.notice: Individual brand icons are the trademarks of their respective owners. See https://simpleicons.org/legal-notice

readmeContent: Sindri's built-in file icon set — 108 icons for common file types, languages, and folder types. Phosphor shapes for folders and system files; canonical simple-icons brand paths for language and tool logos.

manifest.name: Sindri UI Icons
manifest.description: Sindri's built-in activity bar and toolbar icon set — Phosphor regular-weight glyphs as placeholders until custom runic icons are designed.

readmeContent: Sindri's built-in activity bar and toolbar icon set. Phosphor regular-weight glyphs — placeholder until custom runic icons are designed.
